message:
chore(core): regenerate enrollment and simulate CBOR test vectors

Regenerate CBOR test vectors with new key material and request UUIDs.
Structure and schema unchanged — only key IDs and request identifiers
differ from the previous generation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
